t.khattab: On that Day no intercession will be of any benefit, except by those granted permission by the Most Compassionate and whose words are agreeable to Him
t.ghali: Upon that Day (the) intercession will not profit, except for him whom The All-Merciful has given permission, and with whose speech He is satisfied
t.irving: On that day intercession will only benefit someone whom the Mercygiving has permitted to enjoy it, and whose statement has pleased Him
t.iwq: That Day, no intercession will benefit except that of one to whom the Ever-Merciful has given permission and has accepted his word

t_id.kemenag: Pada hari itu tidak berguna syafa'at, kecuali (syafa'at) orang yang Allah Maha Pemurah telah memberi izin kepadanya, dan Dia telah meridhai perkataannya.
t_id.sabiq: Pada hari itu syafaat dari seseorang menjadi tak berguna lagi, kecuali dari orang yang mendapat kemuliaan, izin dan perkenan dari Allah untuk mengucapkan kata syafaat. Hari itu syafaat juga menjadi tak berguna lagi, kecuali bagi orang yang mendapat izin dari Sang Maha Pengasih untuk memperolehnya. Yaitu orang yang dahulunya beriman yang perkataan tauhid dan imannya mendapat perkenan Allah.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Pada hari itu tidak berguna syafaat) seseorang (kecuali syafaat orang yang Allah Maha Pemurah telah memberi izin kepadanya) untuk memberi syafaat (dan Dia telah meridai perkataannya) seumpamanya orang yang diberi izin itu mengatakan, "La Ilaaha Illallaah atau tidak ada Tuhan selain Allah."
t_id.iwq: Pada hari itu tidak berguna syafa'at, kecuali (syafa'at) orang yang Allah Maha Pemurah telah memberi izin kepadanya, dan Dia telah meridhai perkataannya.

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «يومئذ لا تنفع الشفاعة» أحداً «إلا من أذن له الرحمن» أن يشفع له «ورضي له قولا» بأن يقول: لا إله إلا الله
tafsir.siraj-ar: يَوۡمَئِذٖ لَّا تَنفَعُ ٱلشَّفَٰعَةُ إِلَّا مَنۡ أَذِنَ لَهُ ٱلرَّحۡمَٰنُ وَرَضِيَ لَهُۥ قَوۡلٗا
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Pada hari itu tidak berguna syafaat) seseorang (kecuali syafaat orang yang Allah Maha Pemurah telah memberi izin kepadanya) untuk memberi syafaat (dan Dia telah meridai perkataannya) seumpamanya orang yang diberi izin itu mengatakan, "La Ilaaha Illallaah atau tidak ada Tuhan selain Allah

ar: یَعۡلَمُ مَا بَیۡنَ أَیۡدِیهِمۡ وَمَا خَلۡفَهُمۡ وَلَا یُحِیطُونَ بِهِۦ عِلۡمࣰا
ar_simple: یعلم ما بین أیدیهم وما خلفهم ولا یحیطون به علما

t.sahih-int: Allah knows what is [presently] before them and what will be after them, but they do not encompass it in knowledge
t.asad: [for] He knows all that lies open before men and all that is hidden from them, whereas they cannot encompass Him with their knowledge
t.yusuf-ali: He knows what (appears to His creatures as) before or after or behind them: but they shall not compass it with their knowledge
t.pickthall: He knoweth (all) that is before them and (all) that is behind them, while they cannot compass it in knowledge
t.arberry: He knows what is before them and behind them, and they comprehend Him not in knowledge
t.hilali-khan: He (Allah) knows what happens to them (His creatures) in this world, and what will happen to them (in the Hereafter), and they will never compass anything of His Knowledge
t.itani: He knows what is before them and what is behind them, and they cannot comprehend Him in their knowledge.
t.mubarakpuri: He knows what happens to them, and what will happen to them, but they will never encompass anything of His knowledge.
t.qarib: God knows what is before them and what will be after them, but they cannot contain Him with their knowledge
t.wahiduddin: He knows what is before them and what is behind them, but they cannot encompass Him with their knowledge
t.shakir: He knows what is before them and what is behind them, while they do not comprehend it in knowledge
t.haleem: He knows what is before and behind them, though they do not comprehend Him
t.maariful: He knows what is in front of them and what is behind them, and they do not encompass Him in (their) knowledge
t.khattab: He ˹fully˺ knows what is ahead of them and what is behind them, but they cannot encompass Him in ˹their˺ knowledge
t.ghali: He knows whatever is before (Literally: between their hands) them, and whatever is behind them, and they do not encompass Him in knowledge
t.irving: He knows what lies in front of them and what is behind them, while they do not embrace any knowledge about Him
t.iwq: Allah knows what is presently before them and what will be after them, but they do not encompass it in knowledge

t_id.kemenag: Dia mengetahui apa yang ada di hadapan mereka dan apa yang ada di belakang mereka, sedang ilmu mereka tidak dapat meliputi ilmu-Nya.
t_id.sabiq: Allah mengetahui ihwal mereka yang telah lalu di dunia dan apa yang akan mereka hadapi di akhirat. Dialah yang mengatur segala urusan mereka dengan ilmu-Nya. Mereka tidak akan pernah tahu pengaturan dan kebijaksanaan Allah.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Dia mengetahui apa yang ada di hadapan mereka) yaitu perkara-perkara akhirat (dan apa yang ada di belakang mereka) perkara-perkara dunia (sedangkan ilmu mereka tidak dapat meliputi ilmu-Nya") yakni mereka tidak mengetahui hal tersebut.
t_id.iwq: Dia mengetahui apa yang ada di hadapan mereka dan apa yang ada di belakang mereka, sedang ilmu mereka tidak dapat meliputi ilmu-Nya.

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «يعلم ما بين أيديهم» من أمور الآخرة «وما خلفهم» من أمور الدنيا «ولا يحيطون به علماً» لا يعلمون ذلك
tafsir.siraj-ar: يَعۡلَمُ مَا بَيۡنَ أَيۡدِيهِمۡ وَمَا خَلۡفَهُمۡ وَلَا يُحِيطُونَ بِهِۦ عِلۡمٗا
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Dia mengetahui apa yang ada di hadapan mereka) yaitu perkara-perkara akhirat (dan apa yang ada di belakang mereka) perkara-perkara dunia (sedangkan ilmu mereka tidak dapat meliputi ilmu-Nya") yakni mereka tidak mengetahui hal tersebut

ar: ۞ وَعَنَتِ ٱلۡوُجُوهُ لِلۡحَیِّ ٱلۡقَیُّومِۖ وَقَدۡ خَابَ مَنۡ حَمَلَ ظُلۡمࣰا
ar_simple: وعنت ٱلوجوه للحی ٱلقیوم وقد خاب من حمل ظلما

t.sahih-int: And [all] faces will be humbled before the Ever-Living, the Sustainer of existence. And he will have failed who carries injustice
t.asad: And [on that Day] all faces will be humbled before the Ever-Living, the Self-Subsistent Fount of All Being; and undone shall be he who bears [a burden of] evildoing
t.yusuf-ali: (All) faces shall be humbled before (Him) - the Living, the Self-Subsisting, Eternal: hopeless indeed will be the man that carries iniquity (on his back)
t.pickthall: And faces humble themselves before the Living, the Eternal. And he who beareth (a burden of) wrongdoing is indeed a failure (on that day)
t.arberry: And faces shall be humbled unto the Living, the Eternal. He will have failed whose burden is of evildoing
t.hilali-khan: And (all) faces shall be humbled before (Allah), the Ever Living, the One Who sustains and protects all that exists. And he who carried (a burden of) wrongdoing (i.e. he who disbelieved in Allah, ascribed partners to Him, and did deeds of His disobedience), became indeed a complete failure (on that Day)
t.itani: Faces will be humbled before the Living, the Eternal. Whoever carries injustice will despair.
t.mubarakpuri: And (all) faces shall be humbled before the Ever Living, the Sustainer. And he who carried wrongdoing, will be indeed a complete failure.
t.qarib: And [on that day all] faces will be humbled before the Ever-Living, the Sustainer of existence. And he who bears injustice will despair
t.wahiduddin: on that Day all faces shall be humbled before the Living, Self-Subsisting One. Those burdened with evil deeds will come to grief
t.shakir: And the faces shall be humbled before the Living, the Self-subsistent Allah, and he who bears iniquity is indeed a failure
t.haleem: and [all] faces will be humbled before the Living, Ever Watchful One. Those burdened with evil deeds will despair
t.maariful: All faces will be humbled before (Allah,) the Ever-Alive, the All-Sustaining; and the loser will be the one who bears (the burden of his) injustice
t.khattab: And all faces will be humbled before the Ever-Living, All-Sustaining. And those burdened with wrongdoing will be in loss
t.ghali: And faces will be subservient to The Ever Living, The Superb Upright Sustainer, (Or: The Most Upright) and he who bears (a burden of) injustice is already disappointed
t.irving: Faces will seem downcast before the Living, the Eternal, and anyone who carries a load of harm will have blundered
t.iwq: And all faces will be humbled before the Ever-Living, the Sustainer of existence. And he will have failed who carries injustice

t_id.kemenag: Dan tunduklah semua muka (dengan berendah diri) kepada Tuhan Yang Hidup Kekal lagi senantiasa mengurus (makhluk-Nya). Dan sesungguhnya telah merugilah orang yang melakukan kezaliman.
t_id.sabiq: Pada hari itu, semua muka menjadi hina dan tertunduk kepada Sang Mahahidup, yang tidak pernah mati, yang mengatur semua urusan makhluk-Nya. Orang-orang yang menzalimi dirinya di dunia lalu menyekutukan-Nya tidak akan mendapatkan keselamatan dan pahala pada hari itu.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Dan tunduklah semua muka) tunduk merendahkan diri (kepada Tuhan Yang Hidup Kekal lagi Maha Memelihara) yakni Allah swt. (Dan sesungguhnya telah merugilah) (orang yang melakukan kelaliman) yakni kemusyrikan.
t_id.iwq: Dan tunduklah semua muka (dengan berendah diri) kepada Tuhan Yang Hidup Kekal lagi senantiasa mengurus (makhluk-Nya). Dan sesungguhnya telah merugilah orang yang melakukan kezaliman.

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «وعنت الوجوه» خضعت «للحي القيوم» أي الله «وقد خاب» خسر «من حَمَلَ ظلماً» أي شركاً
tafsir.siraj-ar: ۞وَعَنَتِ ٱلۡوُجُوهُ لِلۡحَيِّ ٱلۡقَيُّومِۖ وَقَدۡ خَابَ مَنۡ حَمَلَ ظُلۡمٗا (وَعَنَتِ: خَضَعَتْ، وَذَلَّتْ, الْقَيُّومِ: القَائِمِ عَلَى شُؤُونِ خَلْقِهِ, ظُلْمًا: زِيَادَةً فِي سَيِّئَاتِهِ)
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Dan tunduklah semua muka) tunduk merendahkan diri (kepada Tuhan Yang Hidup Kekal lagi Maha Memelihara) yakni Allah swt. (Dan sesungguhnya telah merugilah) (orang yang melakukan kelaliman) yakni kemusyrikan

ar: وَمَن یَعۡمَلۡ مِنَ ٱلصَّـٰلِحَـٰتِ وَهُوَ مُؤۡمِنࣱ فَلَا یَخَافُ ظُلۡمࣰا وَلَا هَضۡمࣰا
ar_simple: ومن یعمل من ٱلصلحت وهو مؤمن فلا یخاف ظلما ولا هضما

t.sahih-int: But he who does of righteous deeds while he is a believer - he will neither fear injustice nor deprivation
t.asad: whereas anyone who will have done [whatever he could] of righteous deeds, and was a believer withal, need have no fear of being wronged or deprived [of aught of his merit]
t.yusuf-ali: But he who works deeds of righteousness, and has faith, will have no fear of harm nor of any curtailment (of what is his due)
t.pickthall: And he who hath done some good works, being a believer, he feareth not injustice nor begrudging (of his wage)
t.arberry: but whosoever does deeds of righteousness, being a believer, shall fear neither wrong nor injustice
t.hilali-khan: And he who works deeds of righteousness, while he is a believer (in Islamic Monotheism) then he will have no fear of injustice, nor of any curtailment (of his reward)
t.itani: But whoever has done righteous deeds, while being a believer—will fear neither injustice, nor grievance.
t.mubarakpuri: And he who works deeds of righteousness, while he is a believer, then he will have no fear of injustice, nor of any curtailment.
t.qarib: But he who does righteous deeds while he is a believer he will fear neither injustice nor deprivation
t.wahiduddin: but he who does good works, being a believer, shall fear no harm nor any injustice
t.shakir: And whoever does good works and he is a believer, he shall have no fear of injustice nor of the withholding of his due
t.haleem: but whoever has done righteous deeds and believed need have no fear of injustice or deprivation.’
t.maariful: But whoever does righteous deeds, while he is a believer, shall fear neither injustice nor curtailment (of his rewards)
t.khattab: But whoever does good and is a believer will have no fear of being wronged or denied ˹their reward˺
t.ghali: And whoever does deeds of righteousness and he is a believer, then he will fear neither injustice nor forfeiture
t.irving: while anyone who has performed honorable deeds and is a believer will need fear no harm nor any injustice
t.iwq: But he who does of good deeds while he is a believer - he will neither fear injustice nor deprivation

t_id.kemenag: Dan barangsiapa mengerjakan amal-amal yang saleh dan ia dalam keadaan beriman, maka ia tidak khawatir akan perlakuan yang tidak adil (terhadapnya) dan tidak (pula) akan pengurangan haknya.
t_id.sabiq: Sedangkan orang yang melakukan amal saleh dan membenarkan apa yang dibawa oleh Nabi Muhammad saw., maka ia tidak usah khawatir akan ditambah keburukannya atau dikurangi kebaikannya.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Dan barang siapa mengerjakan amal yang saleh) amal-amal ketaatan (dan ia dalam keadaan beriman, maka ia tidak khawatir akan diperlakukan tidak adil) dengan diberatkan dosanya (dan tidak pula akan pengurangan haknya) dikurangi pahala kebaikannya.
t_id.iwq: Dan barangsiapa mengerjakan amal-amal yang saleh dan ia dalam keadaan beriman, maka ia tidak khawatir akan perlakuan yang tidak adil (terhadapnya) dan tidak (pula) akan pengurangan haknya.

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «ومن يعمل من الصالحات» الطاعات «وهو مؤمن فلا يخاف ظلماً» بزيادة في سيئاته «ولا هضماً» بنقص من حسناته
tafsir.siraj-ar: وَمَن يَعۡمَلۡ مِنَ ٱلصَّـٰلِحَٰتِ وَهُوَ مُؤۡمِنٞ فَلَا يَخَافُ ظُلۡمٗا وَلَا هَضۡمٗا (هَضْمًا: نَقْصًا مِنْ حَسَنَاتِهِ)
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Dan barang siapa mengerjakan amal yang saleh) amal-amal ketaatan (dan ia dalam keadaan beriman, maka ia tidak khawatir akan diperlakukan tidak adil) dengan diberatkan dosanya (dan tidak pula akan pengurangan haknya) dikurangi pahala kebaikannya

ar: وَكَذَ ٰلِكَ أَنزَلۡنَـٰهُ قُرۡءَانًا عَرَبِیࣰّا وَصَرَّفۡنَا فِیهِ مِنَ ٱلۡوَعِیدِ لَعَلَّهُمۡ یَتَّقُونَ أَوۡ یُحۡدِثُ لَهُمۡ ذِكۡرࣰا
ar_simple: وكذ لك أنزلنه قرءانا عربیا وصرفنا فیه من ٱلوعید لعلهم یتقون أو یحدث لهم ذكرا

t.sahih-int: And thus We have sent it down as an Arabic Qur'an and have diversified therein the warnings that perhaps they will avoid [sin] or it would cause them remembrance
t.asad: AND THUS have We bestowed from on high this [divine writ] as a discourse in the Arabic tongue, and have given therein many facets to all manner of warnings, so that men might remain conscious of Us, or that it give rise to a new awareness in them
t.yusuf-ali: Thus have We sent this down - an arabic Qur'an - and explained therein in detail some of the warnings, in order that they may fear Allah, or that it may cause their remembrance (of Him)
t.pickthall: Thus we have revealed it as a Lecture in Arabic, and have displayed therein certain threats, that peradventure they may keep from evil or that it may cause them to take heed
t.arberry: Even so We have sent it down as an Arabic Koran, and We have turned about in it something of threats, that haply they may be godfearing, or it may arouse in them remembrance
t.hilali-khan: And thus We have sent it down as a Quran in Arabic, and have explained therein in detail the warnings, in order that they may fear Allah, or that it may cause them to have a lesson from it (or to have the honour for believing and acting on its teachings)
t.itani: Thus We have revealed it an Arabic Quran, and We have diversified the warnings in it, that perhaps they would become righteous, or it may produce a lesson for them.
t.mubarakpuri: And thus We have sent it down as a Qur'an in Arabic, and have explained therein in detail the warnings, in order that they may have Taqwa, or that it may cause them to have a lesson from it.
t.qarib: And thus We have sent down [this revelation] as a perfect Arabic Qur'an and have given warnings that perhaps they will remain mindful of Us, or that it might give them a new awareness
t.wahiduddin: We have thus sent down the Quran in Arabic and given all kinds of warnings in it, so that they may fear God, or may take heed
t.shakir: And thus have We sent it down an Arabic Quran, and have distinctly set forth therein of threats that they may guard (against evil) or that it may produce a reminder for them
t.haleem: We have sent the Quran down in the Arabic tongue and given all kinds of warnings in it, so that they may beware or take heed
t.maariful: And in this way We have sent it down to you as an Arabic Qur’ān, and have detailed in it some warnings in various ways, so that they may fear, or it may produce a lesson for them
t.khattab: And so We have sent it down as an Arabic Quran and varied the warnings in it, so perhaps they will shun evil or it may cause them to be mindful
t.ghali: And thus We have sent it down as an Arabic Qur'an, and We have propounded in it (something) of threats, that possibly they would be pious or it would effect in them remembrance
t.irving: Thus We have sent it down as an Arabic reading and set forth some of the Threat in it so that they may do their duty, or so it will arouse them to remember
t.iwq: And thus We have sent it down as an Arabic Qur'an and have diversified therein the warnings that perhaps they will avoid sin or it would cause them remembrance

t_id.kemenag: Dan demikianlah Kami menurunkan Al Quran dalam bahasa Arab, dan Kami telah menerangkan dengan berulang kali, di dalamnya sebahagian dari ancaman, agar mereka bertakwa atau (agar) Al Quran itu menimbulkan pengajaran bagi mereka.
t_id.sabiq: Seperti penjelasan yang benar inilah--sebagaimana telah lalu dalam surat ini berupa pengagungan Allah, kisah Mûsâ dan berita tentang hari kiamat--Allah menurunkan al-Qur'ân dalam bahasa Arab yang jelas, yang mengandung berbagai bentuk ancaman, dibuat secara berulang-ulang, agar mereka menjauhi kemaksiatan, dan agar al-Qur'ân selalu memperbaharui nasihat dan pelajaran bagi mereka.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Dan demikianlah) lafal Kadzaalika dia'athafkan kepada Kadzaalika Naqushshu pada ayat sembilan puluh sembilan. Artinya: Demikianlah sebagaimana diturunkannya apa yang telah Kami ceritakan tadi (Kami menurunkannya) Alquran (dalam bahasa Arab dan Kami telah menerangkan dengan berulang-ulang) (di dalamnya sebagian dari ancaman, agar mereka bertakwa) takut kepada kemusyrikan (atau agar ia menimbulkan) Alquran ini (pengajaran bagi mereka) melalui kebinasaan yang telah dialami oleh umat-umat sebelumnya sehingga mereka mengambil pelajaran daripadanya.
t_id.iwq: Dan demikianlah Kami menurunkan Al Al-Quran dalam bahasa Arab, dan Kami telah menerangkan dengan berulang kali, di dalamnya sebahagian dari ancaman, agar mereka bertakwa atau (agar) Al Al-Quran itu menimbulkan pengajaran bagi mereka.

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «وكذلك» معطوف على كذلك نقص: أي مثل إنزال ما ذكر «أنزلناه» أي القرآن «قرآناً عربيا وصرفنا» كررنا «فيه من الوعيد لعلهم يتقون» الشرك «أو يُحدث» القرآن «لهم ذكراً» بهلاك من تقدمهم من الأمم فيعتبرون
tafsir.siraj-ar: وَكَذَٰلِكَ أَنزَلۡنَٰهُ قُرۡءَانًا عَرَبِيّٗا وَصَرَّفۡنَا فِيهِ مِنَ ٱلۡوَعِيدِ لَعَلَّهُمۡ يَتَّقُونَ أَوۡ يُحۡدِثُ لَهُمۡ ذِكۡرٗا (وَصَرَّفْنَا: فَصَّلْنَا فِيهِ أَنْوَاعًا مِنَ الوَعِيدِ, ذِكْرًا: تَذْكِرَةً، وَعِظَةً)
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Dan demikianlah) lafal Kadzaalika dia'athafkan kepada Kadzaalika Naqushshu pada ayat sembilan puluh sembilan. Artinya: Demikianlah sebagaimana diturunkannya apa yang telah Kami ceritakan tadi (Kami menurunkannya) Alquran (dalam bahasa Arab dan Kami telah menerangkan dengan berulang-ulang) (di dalamnya sebagian dari ancaman, agar mereka bertakwa) takut kepada kemusyrikan (atau agar ia menimbulkan) Alquran ini (pengajaran bagi mereka) melalui kebinasaan yang telah dialami oleh umat-umat sebelumnya sehingga mereka mengambil pelajaran daripadanya

ar: فَتَعَـٰلَى ٱللَّهُ ٱلۡمَلِكُ ٱلۡحَقُّۗ وَلَا تَعۡجَلۡ بِٱلۡقُرۡءَانِ مِن قَبۡلِ أَن یُقۡضَىٰۤ إِلَیۡكَ وَحۡیُهُۥۖ وَقُل رَّبِّ زِدۡنِی عِلۡمࣰا
ar_simple: فتعلى ٱلله ٱلملك ٱلحق ولا تعجل بٱلقرءان من قبل أن یقضى إلیك وحیه وقل رب زدنی علما

t.sahih-int: So high [above all] is Allah, the Sovereign, the Truth. And, [O Muhammad], do not hasten with [recitation of] the Qur'an before its revelation is completed to you, and say, "My Lord, increase me in knowledge
t.asad: [Know,] then, [that) God is sublimely exalted. the Ultimate Sovereign, the Ultimate Truth and [knowing this,] do not approach the Qur'an in haste, ere it has been revealed unto thee in full, but [always) say: "O my Sustainer, cause me to grow in knowledge
t.yusuf-ali: High above all is Allah, the King, the Truth! Be not in haste with the Qur'an before its revelation to thee is completed, but say, "O my Lord! advance me in knowledge
t.pickthall: Then exalted be Allah, the True King! And hasten not (O Muhammad) with the Qur'an ere its revelation hath been perfected unto thee, and say: My Lord! Increase me in knowledge
t.arberry: So high exalted be God, the true King! And hasten not with the Koran ere its revelation is accomplished unto thee; and say, 'O my Lord, increase me in knowledge
t.hilali-khan: Then High above all be Allah, the True King. And be not in haste (O Muhammad SAW) with the Quran before its revelation is completed to you, and say: "My Lord! Increase me in knowledge
t.itani: Exalted is God, the True King. Do not be hasty with the Quran before its inspiration to you is concluded, and say, “My Lord, increase me in knowledge.”
t.mubarakpuri: Then High above all be Allah, the True King. And be not in haste with the Qur'an before its revelation is completed to you, and say: "My Lord! Increase me in knowledge."
t.qarib: Know then, that God, the Ultimate Sovereign, the Ultimate Truth is So exalted. [Prophet] do not rush ahead with the Qur'an before its revelation to you is complete, and say, "My Lord, increase me in knowledge
t.wahiduddin: exalted is God, the True King. Do not be impatient with the Quran before its revelation is completed, and say, "My Lord, increase my knowledge
t.shakir: Supremely exalted is therefore Allah, the King, the Truth, and do not make haste with the Quran before its revelation is made complete to you and say: O my Lord! increase me in knowledge
t.haleem: exalted be God, the one who is truly in control. [Prophet], do not rush to recite before the revelation is fully complete but say, ‘Lord, increase me in knowledge!’
t.maariful: So High above all is Allah, the True King! And do not hasten with (reciting) the Qur’ān before its revelation to you is concluded, and say, “My Lord, improve me in knowledge.”
t.khattab: Exalted is Allah, the True King! Do not rush to recite ˹a revelation of˺ the Quran ˹O Prophet˺ before it is ˹properly˺ conveyed to you, and pray, “My Lord! Increase me in knowledge.”
t.ghali: So Supremely Exalted be Allah, The True King! And do not hasten with the Qur'an before its revelation is accomplished to you, and say, "Lord! Increase me in knowledge
t.irving: Exalted is God, the True Controller! Do not hurry while reading [the Quran] before its revelation has been accomplished for you, and [rather] SAY: "My Lord, increase me in knowledge
t.iwq: So high above all is Allah, the Sovereign, the Truth. And, O Muhammad, do not hasten with recitation of the Qur'an before its revelation is completed to you, and say, "My Lord, increase me in knowledge

t_id.kemenag: Maka Maha Tinggi Allah Raja Yang sebenar-benarnya, dan janganlah kamu tergesa-gesa membaca Al qur'an sebelum disempurnakan mewahyukannya kepadamu, dan katakanlah: "Ya Tuhanku, tambahkanlah kepadaku ilmu pengetahuan".
t_id.sabiq: Allah berada di atas segala prasangka, Mahasuci dari sifat serupa dengan makhluk-Nya, Maharaja yang dibutuhkan oleh para penguasa dan rakyat jelata. Ketuhanan dan keagungan-Nya mahabenar. Jangan tergesa-gesa, Muhammad, membaca al-Qur'ân sebelum malaikat menyampaikannya dengan sempurna kepadamu. Katakan, "Ya Tuhan, tambahlah ilmuku melalui al-Qur'ân dan pemahaman maknanya."
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Maka Maha Tinggi Allah Raja Yang sesungguhnya) daripada apa yang dikatakan oleh orang-orang musyrik (dan janganlah kamu tergesa-gesa terhadap Alquran) sewaktu kamu membacanya (sebelum disempurnakan mewahyukannya kepadamu) sebelum malaikat Jibril selesai menyampaikannya (dan katakanlah, "Ya Rabbku! Tambahkanlah kepadaku ilmu pengetahuan") tentang Alquran, sehingga setiap kali diturunkan kepadanya Alquran, makin bertambah ilmu pengetahuannya.
t_id.iwq: Maka Maha Tinggi Allah Raja Yang sebenar-benarnya, dan janganlah kamu tergesa-gesa membaca Al qur'an sebelum disempurnakan mewahyukannya kepadamu, dan katakanlah: "Ya Tuhanku, tambahkanlah kepadaku ilmu pengetahuan".

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «فتعالى الله الملك الحق» عما يقول المشركون «ولا تعجل بالقرآن» أي بقراءته «من قبل أن يُقضى إليك وحيه» أي يفرغ جبريل من إبلاغه «وقل ربّ زدني علما» أي بالقرآن فكلما أنزل عليه منه زاد به علمه
tafsir.siraj-ar: فَتَعَٰلَى ٱللَّهُ ٱلۡمَلِكُ ٱلۡحَقُّۗ وَلَا تَعۡجَلۡ بِٱلۡقُرۡءَانِ مِن قَبۡلِ أَن يُقۡضَىٰٓ إِلَيۡكَ وَحۡيُهُۥۖ وَقُل رَّبِّ زِدۡنِي عِلۡمٗا (فَتَعَالَى: فَتَنَزَّهَ، وَارْتَفَعَ، وَتَقَدَّسَ عَنْ كُلِّ نَقْصٍ)
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Maka Maha Tinggi Allah Raja Yang sesungguhnya) daripada apa yang dikatakan oleh orang-orang musyrik (dan janganlah kamu tergesa-gesa terhadap Alquran) sewaktu kamu membacanya (sebelum disempurnakan mewahyukannya kepadamu) sebelum malaikat Jibril selesai menyampaikannya (dan katakanlah, "Ya Rabbku! Tambahkanlah kepadaku ilmu pengetahuan") tentang Alquran, sehingga setiap kali diturunkan kepadanya Alquran, makin bertambah ilmu pengetahuannya

ar: وَلَقَدۡ عَهِدۡنَاۤ إِلَىٰۤ ءَادَمَ مِن قَبۡلُ فَنَسِیَ وَلَمۡ نَجِدۡ لَهُۥ عَزۡمࣰا
ar_simple: ولقد عهدنا إلى ءادم من قبل فنسی ولم نجد له عزما

t.sahih-int: And We had already taken a promise from Adam before, but he forgot; and We found not in him determination
t.asad: AND, INDEED, long ago did We impose Our commandment on Adam; but he forgot it, and We found no firmness of purpose in him
t.yusuf-ali: We had already, beforehand, taken the covenant of Adam, but he forgot: and We found on his part no firm resolve
t.pickthall: And verily We made a covenant of old with Adam, but he forgot, and We found no constancy in him
t.arberry: And We made covenant with Adam before, but he forgot, and We found in him no constancy
t.hilali-khan: And indeed We made a covenant with Adam before, but he forgot, and We found on his part no firm will-power
t.itani: And We covenanted with Adam before, but he forgot, and We found in him no resolve.
t.mubarakpuri: And indeed We made a covenant with Adam before, but he forgot, and We found on his part no firm willpower.
t.qarib: And We had already made a covenant with Adam, but he forgot [it]; and We found him lacking in steadfastness
t.wahiduddin: We made a covenant with Adam before you, but he forgot, and We found him lacking in constancy
t.shakir: And certainly We gave a commandment to Adam before, but he forgot; and We did not find in him any determination
t.haleem: We also commanded Adam before you, but he forgot and We found him lacking in constancy
t.maariful: We had given a directive to ’Ādam earlier, then he forgot, and We did not find in him a firm resolve
t.khattab: And indeed, We once made a covenant with Adam, but he forgot, and ˹so˺ We did not find determination in him
t.ghali: And indeed We already covenanted with Adam earlier, yet he forgot and We found in him no resolve
t.irving: We had already made a pledge with Adam which he forgot. We found he had no determination
t.iwq: And We had already taken a promise from Adam before, but he forgot; and We found not in him determination

t_id.kemenag: Dan sesungguhnya telah Kami perintahkan kepada Adam dahulu, maka ia lupa (akan perintah itu), dan tidak Kami dapati padanya kemauan yang kuat.
t_id.sabiq: Sungguh telah Kami wasiatkan kepada Adam sejak semula sebelummu, Muhammad, agar tidak melanggar perintah Kami. Tetapi Adam kemudian lupa lalu melanggar perjanjian itu. Sejak semula, Kami tidak menemukan tekad dan kemauan yang kuat pada dirinya untuk membentengi diri dari perangkap dan bisikan setan.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Dan sesungguhnya telah Kami perintahkan kepada Adam) Kami telah berwasiat kepadanya, janganlah ia memakan buah pohon terlarang ini (dahulu) sebelum ia memakannya (maka ia lupa) melupakan perintah kami itu (dan tidak Kami dapati padanya kemauan yang kuat) keteguhan dan kesabaran daripada apa yang Kami larang ia mengerjakannya.
t_id.iwq: Dan sesungguhnya telah Kami perintahkan kepada Adam dahulu, maka ia lupa (akan perintah itu), dan tidak Kami dapati padanya kemauan yang kuat.

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «ولقد عهدنا إلى آدم» وصيناه أن لا يأكل من الشجرة «من قبل» أي قبل أكله منها «فنسي» ترك عهدنا «ولم نجد له عزماً» حزماً وصبراً عما نهيناه عنه
tafsir.siraj-ar: وَلَقَدۡ عَهِدۡنَآ إِلَىٰٓ ءَادَمَ مِن قَبۡلُ فَنَسِيَ وَلَمۡ نَجِدۡ لَهُۥ عَزۡمٗا (عَهِدْنَا: وَصَّيْنَا, عَزْمًا: حِفْظًا لِمَا أُمِرَ بِهِ)
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Dan sesungguhnya telah Kami perintahkan kepada Adam) Kami telah berwasiat kepadanya, janganlah ia memakan buah pohon terlarang ini (dahulu) sebelum ia memakannya (maka ia lupa) melupakan perintah kami itu (dan tidak Kami dapati padanya kemauan yang kuat) keteguhan dan kesabaran daripada apa yang Kami larang ia mengerjakannya

ar: وَإِذۡ قُلۡنَا لِلۡمَلَـٰۤئِكَةِ ٱسۡجُدُوا۟ لِءَادَمَ فَسَجَدُوۤا۟ إِلَّاۤ إِبۡلِیسَ أَبَىٰ
ar_simple: وإذ قلنا للملئكة ٱسجدوا لءادم فسجدوا إلا إبلیس أبى

t.sahih-int: And [mention] when We said to the angels, "Prostrate to Adam," and they prostrated, except Iblees; he refused
t.asad: For [thus it was:] when We told the angels, "Prostrate yourselves before Adam!"- they all prostrated themselves, save Ibis, who refused [to do it]
t.yusuf-ali: When We said to the angels, "Prostrate yourselves to Adam", they prostrated themselves, but not Iblis: he refused
t.pickthall: And when We said unto the angels: Fall prostrate before Adam, they fell prostrate (all) save Iblis; he refused
t.arberry: And when We said to the angels, 'Bow yourselves to Adam'; so they bowed themselves, save Iblis; he refused
t.hilali-khan: And (remember) when We said to the angels: "Prostrate yourselves to Adam." They prostrated (all) except Iblis (Satan), who refused
t.itani: And when We said to the angels, “Bow down to Adam.” They bowed down, except for Satan; he refused.
t.mubarakpuri: And (remember) when We said to the angels: "Prostrate yourselves to Adam." They prostrated themselves (all) except Iblis; he refused.
t.qarib: And [mention] when We said to the angels, "Bow down before Adam," and they bowed, except Iblis; he refused
t.wahiduddin: When We said to the angels, "Prostrate yourselves before Adam," they all prostrated themselves, except for Satan, who refused
t.shakir: And when We said to the angels: Make obeisance to Adam, they made obeisance, but Iblis (did it not); he refused
t.haleem: When We said to the angels, ‘Bow down before Adam,’ they did. But Iblis refused
t.maariful: When We said to the angels, “Prostrate yourselves to ’Ādam”. So, all of them fell prostrate, except Iblīs , who refused
t.khattab: And ˹remember˺ when We said to the angels, “Prostrate before Adam,” so they all did—but not Iblîs, who refused ˹arrogantly˺
t.ghali: And as We said to the Angels, "Prostrate yourselves to Adam." So they prostrated themselves, except Iblis; he refused
t.irving: When We told the angels: "Bow down on your knees before Adam," they [all] knelt down except for Diabolis; he refused [to do so]
t.iwq: And mention when We said to the angels, "Prostrate to Adam," and they prostrated, except Iblees; he refused

t_id.kemenag: Dan (ingatlah) ketika Kami berkata kepada malaikat: "Sujudlah kamu kepada Adam", maka mereka sujud kecuali iblis. Ia membangkang.
t_id.sabiq: Ingatlah, wahai Muhammad, ketika Allah memerintahkan para malaikat untuk menghormat Adam sesuai dengan cara yang dikehendaki-Nya, kemudian mereka pun melaksanakan perintah itu. Tetapi iblis, sebangsa jin, yang sedang berada bersama mereka saat itu, melanggar perintah itu. Ia pun akhirnya dikeluarkan dan diusir oleh Allah.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Dan) ingatlah (ketika Kami berkata kepada Malaikat, "Sujudlah kalian kepada Adam!" Maka mereka sujud kecuali iblis) dia adalah bapaknya jin, dia dahulu berteman dengan para Malaikat dan ikut menyembah Allah bersama dengan para Malaikat (ia membangkang) tidak mau sujud kepada Nabi Adam; bahkan mengatakan sebagaimana yang telah disitir oleh firman-Nya; Iblis menjawab, "Saya lebih baik daripadanya..." (Q.S. Al-A'raf, 12).
t_id.iwq: Dan (ingatlah) ketika Kami berkata kepada malaikat: "Sujudlah kamu kepada Adam", maka mereka sujud kecuali iblis. Ia membangkang.

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: (و) اذكر (إذ قلنا للملائكة اسجدوا لآدم فسجدوا إلا إبليس) وهو أبو الجن كان يصحب الملائكة ويعبد الله معهم (أبى) عن السجود لآدم "" قال أنا خير منه
tafsir.siraj-ar: وَإِذۡ قُلۡنَا لِلۡمَلَـٰٓئِكَةِ ٱسۡجُدُواْ لِأٓدَمَ فَسَجَدُوٓاْ إِلَّآ إِبۡلِيسَ أَبَىٰ
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Dan) ingatlah (ketika Kami berkata kepada Malaikat, "Sujudlah kalian kepada Adam!" Maka mereka sujud kecuali iblis) dia adalah bapaknya jin, dia dahulu berteman dengan para Malaikat dan ikut menyembah Allah bersama dengan para Malaikat (ia membangkang) tidak mau sujud kepada Nabi Adam; bahkan mengatakan sebagaimana yang telah disitir oleh firman-Nya; Iblis menjawab, "Saya lebih baik daripadanya..." (Q.S. Al-A'raf)

ar: فَقُلۡنَا یَـٰۤءَادَمُ إِنَّ هَـٰذَا عَدُوࣱّ لَّكَ وَلِزَوۡجِكَ فَلَا یُخۡرِجَنَّكُمَا مِنَ ٱلۡجَنَّةِ فَتَشۡقَىٰۤ
ar_simple: فقلنا یءادم إن هذا عدو لك ولزوجك فلا یخرجنكما من ٱلجنة فتشقى

t.sahih-int: So We said, "O Adam, indeed this is an enemy to you and to your wife. Then let him not remove you from Paradise so you would suffer
t.asad: and thereupon We said: "O Adam! Verily, this is a foe unto thee and thy wife: so let him not drive the two of you out of this garden and render thee unhappy
t.yusuf-ali: Then We said: "O Adam! verily, this is an enemy to thee and thy wife: so let him not get you both out of the Garden, so that thou art landed in misery
t.pickthall: Therefor we said: O Adam! This is an enemy unto thee and unto thy wife, so let him not drive you both out of the Garden so that thou come to toil
t.arberry: Then We said, 'Adam, surely this is an enemy to thee and thy wife. So let him not expel you both from the Garden, so that thou art unprosperous
t.hilali-khan: Then We said: "O Adam! Verily, this is an enemy to you and to your wife. So let him not get you both out of Paradise, so that you be distressed in misery
t.itani: We said, “O Adam, this is an enemy to you and to your wife. So do not let him make you leave the Garden, for then you will suffer.
t.mubarakpuri: Then We said: "O Adam! Verily, this is an enemy to you and to your wife. So let him not get you both out of Paradise, so that you will be distressed."
t.qarib: So We said, "O Adam, this is an enemy to you and to your wife. Do not let him drive you out of the Garden and make you suffer
t.wahiduddin: We said, "Adam, [Satan] is an enemy to you and to your wife. Let him not turn you both out of Paradise and thus make you come to grief
t.shakir: So We said: O Adam! This is an enemy to you and to your wife; therefore let him not drive you both forth from the garden so that you should be unhappy
t.haleem: so We said, ‘Adam, this is your enemy, yours and your wife’s: do not let him drive you out of the garden and make you miserable
t.maariful: So, We said “’Ādam, this is an enemy to you and to your wife. So let him not expel you from Paradise, lest you should get into trouble
t.khattab: So We cautioned, “O Adam! This is surely an enemy to you and to your wife. So do not let him drive you both out of Paradise, for you ˹O Adam˺ would then suffer ˹hardship˺
t.ghali: Then We said, "O Adam, surely this is an enemy to you and to your spouse; so definitely do not let him drive you both out of the Garden, so that you (The Arabic pronoun here is singular) be wretched
t.irving: We said: "Adam, this is an enemy for both you and your wife. Do not let him turn either of you out of the Garden, so you will regret it
t.iwq: Thus We said, "O Adam, verily this is an enemy to you and to your wife. Then let him not remove you from Paradise so you would suffer

t_id.kemenag: Maka Kami berkata: "Hai Adam, sesungguhnya ini (iblis) adalah musuh bagimu dan bagi isterimu, maka sekali-kali janganlah sampai ia mengeluarkan kamu berdua dari surga, yang menyebabkan kamu menjadi celaka.
t_id.sabiq: Maka Allah pun berfirman kepada Adam, "Setan yang melanggar perintah-Ku untuk menghormatmu itu adalah musuh bagimu dan isterimu, Hawâ'. Oleh karena itu, waspadalah terhadap godaannya untuk berbuat maksiat yang dapat menyebabkan kalian keluar dari surga. Dengan begitu, kalian akan hidup celaka setelah keluar dari surga.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Maka Kami berkata, "Hai Adam! Sesungguhnya iblis ini adalah musuh bagimu dan bagi istrimu) yakni Siti Hawa (maka sekali-kali janganlah sampai ia mengeluarkan kamu berdua dari surga, yang menyebabkan kamu menjadi sengsara) hidup sengsara disebabkan terlebih dahulu kamu harus mencangkul, menanam, menuai, menumbuk, membuat roti dan lain sebagainya. Ungkapan sengsara di sini ditujukan hanya kepada Nabi Adam, disebabkan secara fitrah suami itu mencari nafkah buat istrinya.
t_id.iwq: Maka Kami berkata: "Hai Adam, sesungguhnya ini (iblis) adalah musuh bagimu dan bagi isterimu, maka sekali-kali janganlah sampai ia mengeluarkan kamu berdua dari surga, yang menyebabkan kamu menjadi celaka.

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «فقلنا يا آدم إنَّ هذا عدو لك ولزوجك» حواء بالمد «فلا يخرجنكما من الجنة فتشقى» تتعب بالحرث والزرع والحصد والطحن والخبز وغير ذلك واقتصر على شقائه لأن الرجل يسعى على زوجته
tafsir.siraj-ar: فَقُلۡنَا يَـٰٓـَٔادَمُ إِنَّ هَٰذَا عَدُوّٞ لَّكَ وَلِزَوۡجِكَ فَلَا يُخۡرِجَنَّكُمَا مِنَ ٱلۡجَنَّةِ فَتَشۡقَىٰٓ
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Maka Kami berkata, "Hai Adam! Sesungguhnya iblis ini adalah musuh bagimu dan bagi istrimu) yakni Siti Hawa (maka sekali-kali janganlah sampai ia mengeluarkan kamu berdua dari surga, yang menyebabkan kamu menjadi sengsara) hidup sengsara disebabkan terlebih dahulu kamu harus mencangkul, menanam, menuai, menumbuk, membuat roti dan lain sebagainya. Ungkapan sengsara di sini ditujukan hanya kepada Nabi Adam, disebabkan secara fitrah suami itu mencari nafkah buat istrinya

ar: إِنَّ لَكَ أَلَّا تَجُوعَ فِیهَا وَلَا تَعۡرَىٰ
ar_simple: إن لك ألا تجوع فیها ولا تعرى

t.sahih-int: Indeed, it is [promised] for you not to be hungry therein or be unclothed
t.asad: Behold, it is provided for thee that thou shalt not hunger here or feel naked
t.yusuf-ali: There is therein (enough provision) for thee not to go hungry nor to go naked
t.pickthall: It is (vouchsafed) unto thee that thou hungerest not therein nor art naked
t.arberry: It is assuredly given to thee neither to hunger therein, nor to go naked
t.hilali-khan: Verily, you have (a promise from Us) that you will never be hungry therein nor naked
t.itani: In it you will never go hungry, nor be naked.
t.mubarakpuri: "You will never be hungry therein nor naked."
t.qarib: In the Garden you will never go hungry or go naked
t.wahiduddin: Here you shall not go hungry or be naked
t.shakir: Surely it is (ordained) for you that you shall not be hungry therein nor bare of clothing
t.haleem: In the garden you will never go hungry, feel naked
t.maariful: Here you have the privilege that you will not be hungry nor will you be unclad
t.khattab: Here it is guaranteed that you will never go hungry or unclothed
t.ghali: Surely it is (given) to you neither to hunger therein, nor to go naked
t.irving: You have so much in it that you need go neither hungry nor naked
t.iwq: Indeed, it is promised for you not to be hungry therein or be unclothed

t_id.kemenag: Sesungguhnya kamu tidak akan kelaparan di dalamnya dan tidak akan telanjang,
t_id.sabiq: Sebenarnya, sudah merupakan tugas Kami untuk memenuhi kebutuhan hidupmu di dalam surga, hingga kamu tidak akan pernah merasa lapar dan telanjang di dalamnya.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Sesungguhnya kamu tidak akan kelaparan di dalamnya dan tidak akan telanjang). Lafal Allaa adalah gabungan daripada huruf An dan Laa.
t_id.iwq: Sesungguhnya kamu tidak akan kelaparan di dalamnya dan tidak akan telanjang,

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «إن لك أ» «لا تجوع فيها ولا تعرى»
tafsir.siraj-ar: إِنَّ لَكَ أَلَّا تَجُوعَ فِيهَا وَلَا تَعۡرَىٰ (وَلَا تَعْرَى: لَا يُصِيبُكَ العُرْيُ)
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Sesungguhnya kamu tidak akan kelaparan di dalamnya dan tidak akan telanjang). Lafal Allaa adalah gabungan daripada huruf An dan Laa

ar: وَأَنَّكَ لَا تَظۡمَؤُا۟ فِیهَا وَلَا تَضۡحَىٰ
ar_simple: وأنك لا تظمؤا فیها ولا تضحى

t.sahih-int: And indeed, you will not be thirsty therein or be hot from the sun
t.asad: and that thou shalt not thirst here or suffer from the heat of the sun
t.yusuf-ali: Nor to suffer from thirst, nor from the sun's heat
t.pickthall: And that thou thirstest not therein nor art exposed to the sun's heat
t.arberry: neither to thirst therein, nor to suffer the sun
t.hilali-khan: And you (will) suffer not from thirst therein nor from the sun's heat
t.itani: Nor will you be thirsty in it, nor will you swelter.”
t.mubarakpuri: "And you (will) suffer not from thirst therein nor from the sun's heat."
t.qarib: nor will you go thirsty or suffer the heat of the sun
t.wahiduddin: you shall not thirst, nor feel the sun's heat
t.shakir: And that you shall not be thirsty therein nor shall you feel the heat of the sun
t.haleem: be thirsty, or suffer the heat of the sun.’
t.maariful: and you will not be thirsty, nor will you be exposed to sun.”
t.khattab: nor will you ˹ever˺ suffer from thirst or ˹the sun’s˺ heat.”
t.ghali: And that you neither thirst therein, nor suffer the heat (of the sun)
t.irving: you will neither thirst there nor fell sunstruck
t.iwq: And verily, you will not be thirsty therein or be hot from the sun

t_id.kemenag: dan sesungguhnya kamu tidak akan merasa dahaga dan tidak (pula) akan ditimpa panas matahari di dalamnya".
t_id.sabiq: Di dalam surga itu pula, kamu tak akan pernah merasa haus dan tak akan pernah merasakan teriknya matahari seperti yang dirasakan oleh orang yang berusaha keras di luar surga."
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Dan sesungguhnya kamu) baik dibaca Annaka atau Innaka, diathafkan kepada isimnya Inna pada ayat sebelumnya dan jumlah kalimat kelanjutannya ialah (tidak akan merasa dahaga di dalamnya) yakni tidak akan merasa haus (dan tidak pula akan ditimpa panas matahari di dalamnya") yaitu sinar matahari di waktu dhuha tidak akan kamu alami lagi, karena di dalam surga tidak ada matahari.
t_id.iwq: dan sesungguhnya kamu tidak akan merasa dahaga dan tidak (pula) akan ditimpa panas matahari di dalamnya".

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «وأنك» بفتح الهمزة وكسرها عطف على اسم إن وجملتها «لا تظمأ فيها» تعطش «ولا تضحى» لا يحصل لك حر شمس الضحى لانتفاء الشمس في الجنة
tafsir.siraj-ar: وَأَنَّكَ لَا تَظۡمَؤُاْ فِيهَا وَلَا تَضۡحَىٰ (وَلَا تَضْحَى: لَا يُصِيبُكَ حَرُّ الشَّمْسِ)
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Dan sesungguhnya kamu) baik dibaca Annaka atau Innaka, diathafkan kepada isimnya Inna pada ayat sebelumnya dan jumlah kalimat kelanjutannya ialah (tidak akan merasa dahaga di dalamnya) yakni tidak akan merasa haus (dan tidak pula akan ditimpa panas matahari di dalamnya") yaitu sinar matahari di waktu dhuha tidak akan kamu alami lagi, karena di dalam surga tidak ada matahari

ar: فَوَسۡوَسَ إِلَیۡهِ ٱلشَّیۡطَـٰنُ قَالَ یَـٰۤءَادَمُ هَلۡ أَدُلُّكَ عَلَىٰ شَجَرَةِ ٱلۡخُلۡدِ وَمُلۡكࣲ لَّا یَبۡلَىٰ
ar_simple: فوسوس إلیه ٱلشیطن قال یءادم هل أدلك على شجرة ٱلخلد وملك لا یبلى

t.sahih-int: Then Satan whispered to him; he said, "O Adam, shall I direct you to the tree of eternity and possession that will not deteriorate
t.asad: But Satan whispered unto him, saying: "O Adam! Shall I lead thee to the tree of life eternal; and [thus] to a kingdom that will never decay
t.yusuf-ali: But Satan whispered evil to him: he said, "O Adam! shall I lead thee to the Tree of Eternity and to a kingdom that never decays
t.pickthall: But the devil whispered to him, saying: O Adam! Shall I show thee the tree of immortality and power that wasteth not away
t.arberry: Then Satan whispered to him saying, 'Adam, shall I point thee to the Tree of Eternity, and a Kingdom that decays not
t.hilali-khan: Then Shaitan (Satan) whispered to him, saying: "O Adam! Shall I lead you to the Tree of Eternity and to a kingdom that will never waste away
t.itani: But Satan whispered to him. He said, “O Adam, shall I show you the Tree of Immortality, and a kingdom that never decays?”
t.mubarakpuri: Then Shaytan whispered to him, saying: "O Adam! Shall I lead you to the Tree of Eternity and to a kingdom that will never waste away"
t.qarib: Then Satan whispered to him, saying, "Adam, shall I show you the tree of immortality and a kingdom that will never decay
t.wahiduddin: But Satan whispered evil to him, saying, "Adam, shall I lead you to the tree of immortality and to a kingdom that never declines
t.shakir: But the Shaitan made an evil suggestion to him; he said: O Adam! Shall I guide you to the tree of immortality and a kingdom which decays not
t.haleem: But Satan whispered to Adam, saying, ‘Adam, shall I show you the tree of immortality and power that never decays?’
t.maariful: Then the Satan instigated him. He said, “’Ādam, shall I guide you to the tree of eternity and to an empire that does not decay?”
t.khattab: But Satan whispered to him, saying, “O Adam! Shall I show you the Tree of Immortality and a kingdom that does not fade away?”
t.ghali: Then Ash-Shaytan (The Ever-Vicious, i.e., the Devil) whispered to him. He said, "O Adam, shall I indicate to you the Tree of Eternity and a Kingdom that does not decay
t.irving: Satan whispered to him; he said: "Adam, shall I lead you to the Tree of Immortality and such control as will never disappear
t.iwq: Then Satan whispered to him; he said, "O Adam, shall I direct you to the tree of eternity and possession that will not deteriorate

t_id.kemenag: Kemudian syaitan membisikkan pikiran jahat kepadanya, dengan berkata: "Hai Adam, maukah saya tunjukkan kepada kamu pohon khuldi dan kerajaan yang tidak akan binasa?"
t_id.sabiq: Lalu setan membisikkan bujukan kepada Adam dan istrinya untuk memakan buah pohon yang terlarang dengan berkata, "Hai Adam, aku akan menunjukkan kepadamu sebuah pohon. Siapa yang memakan buahnya akan mendapat nikmat keabadian dan kerajaan yang tak akan pernah punah di dalam surga."
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Kemudian setan membisikkan pikiran jahat kepadanya seraya berkata, "Hai Adam! Maukah saya tunjukkan kepada kamu pohon keabadian) yaitu pohon yang barang siapa memakan buahnya akan hidup kekal (dan kerajaan yang tidak akan binasa?") yakni kerajaan yang kekal.
t_id.iwq: Kemudian syaitan membisikkan pikiran jahat kepadanya, dengan berkata: "Hai Adam, maukah saya tunjukkan kepada kamu pohon khuldi dan kerajaan yang tidak akan binasa?"

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «فوسوس إليه الشيطان قال يا آدم هل أدلك على شجرة الخلد» أي التي يخلد من يأكل منها «ومُلْك لا يبلى» لا يفنى وهو لازم الخلد
tafsir.siraj-ar: فَوَسۡوَسَ إِلَيۡهِ ٱلشَّيۡطَٰنُ قَالَ يَـٰٓـَٔادَمُ هَلۡ أَدُلُّكَ عَلَىٰ شَجَرَةِ ٱلۡخُلۡدِ وَمُلۡكٖ لَّا يَبۡلَىٰ (لَّا يَبْلَى: لَا يَنْقَضِي، وَلَا يَنْقَطِعُ)
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Kemudian setan membisikkan pikiran jahat kepadanya seraya berkata, "Hai Adam! Maukah saya tunjukkan kepada kamu pohon keabadian) yaitu pohon yang barang siapa memakan buahnya akan hidup kekal (dan kerajaan yang tidak akan binasa?") yakni kerajaan yang kekal

ar: فَأَكَلَا مِنۡهَا فَبَدَتۡ لَهُمَا سَوۡءَ ٰتُهُمَا وَطَفِقَا یَخۡصِفَانِ عَلَیۡهِمَا مِن وَرَقِ ٱلۡجَنَّةِۚ وَعَصَىٰۤ ءَادَمُ رَبَّهُۥ فَغَوَىٰ
ar_simple: فأكلا منها فبدت لهما سوء تهما وطفقا یخصفان علیهما من ورق ٱلجنة وعصى ءادم ربه فغوى

t.sahih-int: And Adam and his wife ate of it, and their private parts became apparent to them, and they began to fasten over themselves from the leaves of Paradise. And Adam disobeyed his Lord and erred
t.asad: And so the two ate [of the fruit] thereof: and thereupon they became conscious of their nakedness and began to cover themselves with pieced-together leaves from the garden. And [thus] did Adam disobey his Sustainer, and thus did he fall into grievous error
t.yusuf-ali: In the result, they both ate of the tree, and so their nakedness appeared to them: they began to sew together, for their covering, leaves from the Garden: thus did Adam disobey his Lord, and allow himself to be seduced
t.pickthall: Then they twain ate thereof, so that their shame became apparent unto them, and they began to hide by heaping on themselves some of the leaves of the Garden. And Adam disobeyed his Lord, so went astray
t.arberry: So the two of them ate of it, and their shameful parts revealed to them, and they took to stitching upon themselves leaves of the Garden. And Adam disobeyed his Lord, and so he erred
t.hilali-khan: Then they both ate of the tree, and so their private parts appeared to them, and they began to stick on themselves the leaves from Paradise for their covering. Thus did Adam disobey his Lord, so he went astray
t.itani: And so they ate from it; whereupon their bodies became visible to them, and they started covering themselves with the leaves of the Garden. Thus Adam disobeyed his Lord, and fell.
t.mubarakpuri: Then they both ate of the Tree, and so their private parts became manifest to them, and they began to cover themselves with the leaves of the Paradise for their covering. Thus Adam disobeyd his Lord, so he went astray.
t.qarib: And they both ate from it, so that their nakedness became apparent to them, and they began to cover themselves with the leaves from the Garden. Adam disobeyed his Lord and was led astray
t.wahiduddin: They both ate the fruit of this tree, and so they became conscious of their nakedness and began to cover themselves with the leaves of the Garden. Thus Adam disobeyed his Lord and fell into error
t.shakir: Then they both ate of it, so their evil inclinations became manifest to them, and they both began to cover themselves with leaves of the garden, and Adam disobeyed his Lord, so his life became evil (to him)
t.haleem: and they both ate from it. They became conscious of their nakedness and began to cover themselves with leaves from the garden. Adam disobeyed his Lord and was led astray
t.maariful: So, both of them Ādam and Hawwā’ (Eve)] ate from it, and their parts of shame were exposed to them, and they started stitching on themselves some of the leaves of Paradise. And ’Ādam disobeyed his Lord, and erred
t.khattab: So they both ate from the tree and then their nakedness was exposed to them, prompting them to cover themselves with leaves from Paradise. So Adam disobeyed his Lord, and ˹so˺ lost his way
t.ghali: So the two of them ate of it, (and) so their shameful parts became displayed to them, and they took to splicing upon themselves (some) of the leaves of the Garden. And ??dam disobeyed his Lord; so he became misguided
t.irving: So they both ate some of it, and their private parts became apparent to them. They set to patching themselves over with leaves from the Garden. Adam had disobeyed his Lord and was misled
t.iwq: And Adam and his wife ate of it, and their private parts became apparent to them, and they began to fasten over themselves from the leaves of Paradise. And Adam disobeyed his Lord and erred

t_id.kemenag: Maka keduanya memakan dari buah pohon itu, lalu nampaklah bagi keduanya aurat-auratnya dan mulailah keduanya menutupinya dengan daun-daun (yang ada di) surga, dan durhakalah Adam kepada Tuhan dan sesatlah ia.
t_id.sabiq: Setan pun menunjukkan pohon terlarang itu, sehingga Adam dan istrinya terpedaya dengan rayuannya dan lupa akan larangan Allah. Mereka akhirnya memakan buah pohon itu. Seketika, aurat mereka tersingkap sebagai balasan atas ketamakannya yang menyebabkan mereka lupa dan melanggar larangan Allah. Mereka kemudian memetik daun pohon surga untuk menutupi auratnya yang tersingkap. Begitulah, Adam telah melanggar perintah Tuhannya. Peristiwa itu terjadi sebelum ia diangkat sebagai nabi. Ia pun akhirnya tidak memperoleh keabadian yang diharapkan. Rusaklah hidupnya.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Maka keduanya memakan) yakni Adam dan Hawa (dari buah pohon itu, lalu tampaklah bagi keduanya aurat-auratnya) yakni keduanya dapat melihat kemaluan masing-masing. Kedua aurat itu dinamakan kemaluan disebabkan jika kelihatan maka orang yang memilikinya menjadi malu (dan mulailah keduanya menutupi) keduanya menempelkan kepada (aurat masing-masing dengan daun-daun yang ada di surga) untuk menutupi auratnya (dan durhakalah Adam kepada Rabbnya dan sesatlah ia) disebabkan memakan buah pohon yang terlarang itu.
t_id.iwq: Maka keduanya memakan dari buah pohon itu, lalu nampaklah bagi keduanya aurat-auratnya dan mulailah keduanya menutupinya dengan daun-daun (yang ada di) surga, dan durhakalah Adam kepada Tuhan dan sesatlah ia.

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «فأكلا» أي آدم وحواء «منها فبدت لهما سوآتهما» أي ظهر لكل منهما قبله وقبل الآخر ودُبره وسمي كل منهما سوأة لأن انكشافه يسوء صاحبه «وطفقا يخصفان» أخذا يلزقان «عليهما من ورق الجنة» ليستترا به «وعصى آدم ربه فغوى» بالأكل من الشجرة
tafsir.siraj-ar: فَأَكَلَا مِنۡهَا فَبَدَتۡ لَهُمَا سَوۡءَٰتُهُمَا وَطَفِقَا يَخۡصِفَانِ عَلَيۡهِمَا مِن وَرَقِ ٱلۡجَنَّةِۚ وَعَصَىٰٓ ءَادَمُ رَبَّهُۥ فَغَوَىٰ (سَوْآتُهُمَا: عَوْرَاتُهُمَا, وَطَفِقَا: أَخَذَا, يَخْصِفَانِ: يُلْصِقَانِ)
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Maka keduanya memakan) yakni Adam dan Hawa (dari buah pohon itu, lalu tampaklah bagi keduanya aurat-auratnya) yakni keduanya dapat melihat kemaluan masing-masing. Kedua aurat itu dinamakan kemaluan disebabkan jika kelihatan maka orang yang memilikinya menjadi malu (dan mulailah keduanya menutupi) keduanya menempelkan kepada (aurat masing-masing dengan daun-daun yang ada di surga) untuk menutupi auratnya (dan durhakalah Adam kepada Rabbnya dan sesatlah ia) disebabkan memakan buah pohon yang terlarang itu

ar: ثُمَّ ٱجۡتَبَـٰهُ رَبُّهُۥ فَتَابَ عَلَیۡهِ وَهَدَىٰ
ar_simple: ثم ٱجتبه ربه فتاب علیه وهدى

t.sahih-int: Then his Lord chose him and turned to him in forgiveness and guided [him]
t.asad: Thereafter, [however,) his Sustainer elected him [for His grace], and accepted his repentance, and bestowed His guidance upon him
t.yusuf-ali: But his Lord chose him (for His Grace): He turned to him, and gave him Guidance
t.pickthall: Then his Lord chose him, and relented toward him, and guided him
t.arberry: Thereafter his Lord chose him, and turned again unto him, and He guided him
t.hilali-khan: Then his Lord chose him, and turned to him with forgiveness, and gave him guidance
t.itani: But then his Lord recalled him, and pardoned him, and guided him.
t.mubarakpuri: Then his Lord chose him, and turned to him with forgiveness, and gave him guidance.
t.qarib: But later, his Lord chose to bring him closer, accepted his repentance, and guided him
t.wahiduddin: Then his Lord had mercy on him, accepted his repentance and guided him
t.shakir: Then his Lord chose him, so He turned to him and guided (him)
t.haleem: later his Lord brought him close, accepted his repentance, and guided him
t.maariful: Thereafter his Lord chose him. So He accepted his repentance and gave (him) guidance
t.khattab: Then his Lord chose him ˹for His grace˺, accepted his repentance, and guided him ˹rightly˺
t.ghali: Thereafter his Lord selected him; so He relented to him, and He guided him
t.irving: Later on his Lord chose him, and He relented towards him and guided [him]
t.iwq: Then his Lord chose him and turned to him in forgiveness and guided him

t_id.kemenag: Kemudian Tuhannya memilihnya maka Dia menerima taubatnya dan memberinya petunjuk.
t_id.sabiq: Setelah itu, Allah memilih Adam untuk membawa pesan-pesan suci-Nya. Allah pun menerima pertobatannya dan memberinya petunjuk untuk meminta ampun dan beristigfar.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Kemudian Rabbnya memilihnya) yakni mendekatkannya ke sisi-Nya (maka Dia menerima tobatnya) sebelum Nabi Adam bertobat (dan memberinya petunjuk) supaya terus-menerus bertobat.
t_id.iwq: Kemudian Tuhannya memilihnya maka Dia menerima taubatnya dan memberinya petunjuk.

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «ثم اجتباه ربه» قربه «فتاب عليه» قبل توبته «وهدى» أي هداه إلى المداومة على التوبة
tafsir.siraj-ar: ثُمَّ ٱجۡتَبَٰهُ رَبُّهُۥ فَتَابَ عَلَيۡهِ وَهَدَىٰ (اجْتَبَاهُ: اصْطَفَاهُ)
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Kemudian Rabbnya memilihnya) yakni mendekatkannya ke sisi-Nya (maka Dia menerima tobatnya) sebelum Nabi Adam bertobat (dan memberinya petunjuk) supaya terus-menerus bertobat

ar: قَالَ ٱهۡبِطَا مِنۡهَا جَمِیعَۢاۖ بَعۡضُكُمۡ لِبَعۡضٍ عَدُوࣱّۖ فَإِمَّا یَأۡتِیَنَّكُم مِّنِّی هُدࣰى فَمَنِ ٱتَّبَعَ هُدَایَ فَلَا یَضِلُّ وَلَا یَشۡقَىٰ
ar_simple: قال ٱهبطا منها جمیعا بعضكم لبعض عدو فإما یأتینكم منی هدى فمن ٱتبع هدای فلا یضل ولا یشقى

t.sahih-int: [Allah] said, "Descend from Paradise - all, [your descendants] being enemies to one another. And if there should come to you guidance from Me - then whoever follows My guidance will neither go astray [in the world] nor suffer [in the Hereafter]
t.asad: saying: "Down with you all from this [state of innocence, and be henceforth] enemies unto one another! None the less, there shall most certainly come unto you guidance from Me: and he who follows My guidance will not go astray, and neither will he be unhappy
t.yusuf-ali: He said: "Get ye down, both of you,- all together, from the Garden, with enmity one to another: but if, as is sure, there comes to you Guidance from Me, whosoever follows My Guidance, will not lose his way, nor fall into misery
t.pickthall: He said: Go down hence, both of you, one of you a foe unto the other. But when there come unto you from Me a guidance, then whoso followeth My guidance, he will not go astray nor come to grief
t.arberry: Said He, 'Get you down, both of you together, out of it, each of you an enemy to each; but if there comes to you from Me guidance, then whosoever follows My guidance shall not go astray, neither shall he be unprosperous
t.hilali-khan: (Allah) said:"Get you down (from the Paradise to the earth), both of you, together, some of you are an enemy to some others. Then if there comes to you guidance from Me, then whoever follows My Guidance shall neither go astray, nor fall into distress and misery
t.itani: He said, “Go down from it, altogether; some of you enemies of some others. But whenever guidance comes to you from Me, whoever follows My guidance, will not go astray, nor suffer.
t.mubarakpuri: He (Allah) said: "Get you down, both of you, together, some of you are an enemy to some others. Then if there comes to you guidance from Me, then whoever follows My guidance he shall neither go astray nor shall be distressed.
t.qarib: [God] said, "Go down from it, all of you, as enemies to one another. But when guidance comes to you from Me, then whoever follows My guidance will neither go astray [in this world] nor suffer [in the Hereafter]
t.wahiduddin: God said, "Go down, both of you, from here, as enemies to one another." If there comes to you guidance from Me, then whoever follows My guidance will not lose his way, nor will he come to grief
t.shakir: He said: Get forth you two therefrom, all (of you), one of you (is) enemy to another. So there will surely come to you guidance from Me, then whoever follows My guidance, he shall not go astray nor be unhappy
t.haleem: God said, ‘Get out of the garden as each other’s enemy.’ Whoever follows My guidance, when it comes to you [people], will not go astray nor fall into misery
t.maariful: He said (to ’Ādam and Iblīs), “Go down from here, all of you, some of you enemies of some others. Then, should some guidance come to you from Me, the one who follows My guidance shall not go astray, nor shall he be in trouble
t.khattab: Allah said, “Descend, both of you, from here together ˹with Satan˺ as enemies to each other. Then when guidance comes to you from Me, whoever follows My guidance will neither go astray ˹in this life˺ nor suffer ˹in the next˺
t.ghali: Said He, "Get down, you two altogether out of it; some of you an enemy to some (others); yet, in case ever there definitely comes to you from Me guidance, then whoever closely follows My guidance, so he will not err away, nor will he be wretched
t.irving: He said: "Clear out of here, both of you together! Some of you [will become] enemies of others. Should guidance ever come to you from Me, no one who follows My guidance shall ever stray away nor regret it
t.iwq: Allah said, "Descend from Paradise - all, your descendants being enemies to one another. And if there should come to you guidance from Me - then whoever follows My guidance will neither go astray in the world nor suffer in the Hereafter

t_id.kemenag: Allah berfirman: "Turunlah kamu berdua dari surga bersama-sama, sebagian kamu menjadi musuh bagi sebagian yang lain. Maka jika datang kepadamu petunjuk daripada-Ku, lalu barangsiapa yang mengikut petunjuk-Ku, ia tidak akan sesat dan tidak akan celaka.
t_id.sabiq: Allah memerintahkan Adam dan istrinya untuk keluar dari surga, turun ke bumi. Kepada mereka, Allah memberitahukan bahwa akan terjadi permusuhan di antara keturunan mereka berdua kelak. Selain itu, Allah juga memberikan petunjuk dan bimbingan kepada mereka. Siapa saja yang mengikuti petunjuk itu, pasti tidak akan terjerumus ke dalam perbuatan dosa di dunia dan tidak akan celaka dan tersiksa.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Allah berfirman, "Turunlah kamu berdua) Adam dan Hawa berikut apa yang telah dikandung oleh kalian yaitu anak cucu kalian (daripadanya) dari surga (bersama-sama, sebagian kalian) sebagian keturunan kalian (menjadi musuh bagi sebagian yang lain) disebabkan sebagian dari mereka berbuat zalim terhadap sebagian yang lain. (Maka jika) lafal Imma ini asalnya terdiri dari In Syarthiyah yang diidgamkan kepada Ma Zaidah (jika datang kepada kalian petunjuk daripada-Ku maka barang siapa yang mengikuti petunjuk-Ku) yakni Alquran (maka ia tidak akan sesat) di dunia (dan tidak akan celaka) di akhirat nanti.
t_id.iwq: Allah berfirman: "Turunlah kamu berdua dari surga bersama-sama, sebagian kamu menjadi musuh bagi sebagian yang lain. Maka jika datang kepadamu petunjuk daripada-Ku, lalu barangsiapa yang mengikut petunjuk-Ku, ia tidak akan sesat dan tidak akan celaka.

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «قال اهبطا» أي آدم وحواء بما اشمتلنا عليه من ذريتكما «منها» من الجنة «جميعاً بعضكم» بعض الذرية «لبعض عدو» من ظلم بعضهم بعضاً «فإما» فيه إدغام نون إن الشرطية في ما المزيدة «يأتينكم مني هدى فمن اتبع هدايَ» القرآن «فلا يضل» في الدنيا «ولا يشقى» في الآخرة
tafsir.siraj-ar: قَالَ ٱهۡبِطَا مِنۡهَا جَمِيعَۢاۖ بَعۡضُكُمۡ لِبَعۡضٍ عَدُوّٞۖ فَإِمَّا يَأۡتِيَنَّكُم مِّنِّي هُدٗى فَمَنِ ٱتَّبَعَ هُدَايَ فَلَا يَضِلُّ وَلَا يَشۡقَىٰ
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Allah berfirman, "Turunlah kamu berdua) Adam dan Hawa berikut apa yang telah dikandung oleh kalian yaitu anak cucu kalian (daripadanya) dari surga (bersama-sama, sebagian kalian) sebagian keturunan kalian (menjadi musuh bagi sebagian yang lain) disebabkan sebagian dari mereka berbuat zalim terhadap sebagian yang lain. (Maka jika) lafal Imma ini asalnya terdiri dari In Syarthiyah yang diidgamkan kepada Ma Zaidah (jika datang kepada kalian petunjuk daripada-Ku maka barang siapa yang mengikuti petunjuk-Ku) yakni Alquran (maka ia tidak akan sesat) di dunia (dan tidak akan celaka) di akhirat nanti

ar: وَمَنۡ أَعۡرَضَ عَن ذِكۡرِی فَإِنَّ لَهُۥ مَعِیشَةࣰ ضَنكࣰا وَنَحۡشُرُهُۥ یَوۡمَ ٱلۡقِیَـٰمَةِ أَعۡمَىٰ
ar_simple: ومن أعرض عن ذكری فإن له معیشة ضنكا ونحشره یوم ٱلقیمة أعمى

t.sahih-int: And whoever turns away from My remembrance - indeed, he will have a depressed life, and We will gather him on the Day of Resurrection blind
t.asad: But as for him who shall turn away from remembering Me - his shall be a life of narrow scope and on the Day of Resurrection We shall raise him up blind
t.yusuf-ali: But whosoever turns away from My Message, verily for him is a life narrowed down, and We shall raise him up blind on the Day of Judgment
t.pickthall: But he who turneth away from remembrance of Me, his will be a narrow life, and I shall bring him blind to the assembly on the Day of Resurrection
t.arberry: but whosoever turns away from My remembrance, his shall be a life of narrowness, and on the Resurrection Day We shall raise him blind
t.hilali-khan: But whosoever turns away from My Reminder (i.e. neither believes in this Quran nor acts on its orders, etc.) verily, for him is a life of hardship, and We shall raise him up blind on the Day of Resurrection
t.itani: But whoever turns away from My Reminder, for him is a confined life. And We will raise him on the Day of Resurrection blind.”
t.mubarakpuri: But whosoever turns away from My Reminder, verily, for him is a life of hardship, and We shall raise him up blind on the Day of Resurrection."
t.qarib: But whoever turns away from remembering Me, he will have a life of great hardship, and We will raise him blind on the Day of Resurrection
t.wahiduddin: but whoever turns away from My reminder, will lead a straitened existence and on the Day of Judgement We shall raise him up blind
t.shakir: And whoever turns away from My reminder, his shall be a straitened life, and We will raise him on the day of resurrection, blind
t.haleem: but whoever turns away from it will have a life of great hardship. We shall bring him blind to the Assembly on the Day of Resurrection
t.maariful: As for the one who turns away from My message, he shall have a straitened life, and We shall raise him blind on the Day of Judgment.”
t.khattab: But whoever turns away from My Reminder will certainly have a miserable life, then We will raise them up blind on the Day of Judgment.”
t.ghali: And whoever veers away from My Remembrance, then surely he will have a cramped subsistence and We will muster him blind on the Day of the Resurrection
t.irving: while anyone who fails to remember Me will have a meager living and We shall summon him as a blind person on Resurrection Day
t.iwq: And whoever turns away from My remembrance - verily, he will have a depressed life, and We will gather him on the Day of Resurrection blind

t_id.kemenag: Dan barangsiapa berpaling dari peringatan-Ku, maka sesungguhnya baginya penghidupan yang sempit, dan Kami akan menghimpunkannya pada hari kiamat dalam keadaan buta".
t_id.sabiq: Tetapi, sebaliknya, siapa saja yang tidak mau menerima petunjuk Allah dan tidak pula menaati-Nya, ia tak akan mendapat kebahagiaan hidup di dunia, sehingga tak akan pernah merasa puas dengan pemberian Allah dan tak akan pasrah dengan qadlâ' dan qadar-Nya. Sehingga, begitu hari kiamat tiba, ia akan datang ke tempat perhitungan untuk dibalas atas dosa-dosanya, dalam keadaan tidak mampu berkilah dan beralasan. Ia bagai orang buta, seperti ia buta terhadap tanda-tanda kekuasaan Allah ketika hidup di dunia dulu.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Dan barang siapa berpaling dari peringatan-Ku) yakni Alquran, yaitu dia tidak beriman kepadanya (maka sesungguhnya baginya penghidupan yang sempit) lafal Dhankan ini merupakan Mashdar artinya sempit. Ditafsirkan oleh sebuah hadis, bahwa hal ini menunjukkan tentang diazabnya orang kafir di dalam kuburnya (dan Kami akan mengumpulkannya) orang yang berpaling dari Alquran (pada hari kiamat dalam keadaan buta") penglihatannya.
t_id.iwq: Dan barangsiapa berpaling dari peringatan-Ku, maka sesungguhnya baginya penghidupan yang sempit, dan Kami akan menghimpunkannya pada hari kiamat dalam keadaan buta".

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «ومن أعرض عن ذكري» القرآن فلم يؤمن به «فإن له معيشة ضنكاً» بالتنوين مصدر بمعنى ضيقة، وفسرت في حديث بعذاب الكافر في قبره «ونحشره» أي المعرض عن القرآن «يوم القيامة أعمى» أعمى البصر
tafsir.siraj-ar: وَمَنۡ أَعۡرَضَ عَن ذِكۡرِي فَإِنَّ لَهُۥ مَعِيشَةٗ ضَنكٗا وَنَحۡشُرُهُۥ يَوۡمَ ٱلۡقِيَٰمَةِ أَعۡمَىٰ (ضَنْكًا: ضَيِّقَةً شَاقَّةً)
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Dan barang siapa berpaling dari peringatan-Ku) yakni Alquran, yaitu dia tidak beriman kepadanya (maka sesungguhnya baginya penghidupan yang sempit) lafal Dhankan ini merupakan Mashdar artinya sempit. Ditafsirkan oleh sebuah hadis, bahwa hal ini menunjukkan tentang diazabnya orang kafir di dalam kuburnya (dan Kami akan mengumpulkannya) orang yang berpaling dari Alquran (pada hari kiamat dalam keadaan buta") penglihatannya

ar: قَالَ رَبِّ لِمَ حَشَرۡتَنِیۤ أَعۡمَىٰ وَقَدۡ كُنتُ بَصِیرࣰا
ar_simple: قال رب لم حشرتنی أعمى وقد كنت بصیرا

t.sahih-int: He will say, "My Lord, why have you raised me blind while I was [once] seeing
t.asad: [And so, on Resurrection Day, the sinner] will ask: "O my Sustainer! Why hast Thou raised me up blind, whereas [on earth] I was endowed with sight
t.yusuf-ali: He will say: "O my Lord! why hast Thou raised me up blind, while I had sight (before)
t.pickthall: He will say: My Lord! Wherefor hast Thou gathered me (hither) blind, when I was wont to see
t.arberry: He shall say, 'O my Lord, why hast thou raised me blind, and I was wont to see
t.hilali-khan: He will say:"O my Lord! Why have you raised me up blind, while I had sight (before)
t.itani: He will say, “My Lord, why did You raise me blind, though I was seeing?”
t.mubarakpuri: He will say: "O my Lord! Why have you raised me up blind, while I had sight (before)."
t.qarib: He will say, "My Lord, why have you raised me blind whereas I was able to see before
t.wahiduddin: and he will ask, "Lord, why have You raised me up blind, while I possessed sight before
t.shakir: He shall say: My Lord! why hast Thou raised me blind and I was a seeing one indeed
t.haleem: and he will say, ‘Lord, why did You bring me here blind? I was sighted before!’
t.maariful: He will say, “My Lord, why did you raise me blind while I was sighted?”
t.khattab: They will cry, “My Lord! Why have you raised me up blind, although I used to see?”
t.ghali: He will say, "Lord! Why have You mustered me blind, and I was already constantly beholding
t.irving: He will say: "My Lord, why have you summoned me as a blind person when was I sighted
t.iwq: He will say, "My Lord, why have you raised me blind while I was once seeing

t_id.kemenag: Berkatalah ia: "Ya Tuhanku, mengapa Engkau menghimpunkan aku dalam keadaan buta, padahal aku dahulunya adalah seorang yang melihat?"
t_id.sabiq: Dalam situasi seperti ini, dengan gentar ia menanyakan Tuhannya, "Ya Tuhan, mengapa Kau buat aku lupa akan alasan-alasanku dan tidak mampu memohon maaf? Mengapa pula Kau tempatkan aku seperti orang buta, sedangkan di dunia aku bisa melihat apa saja yang ada di sekitarku, mendebat dan mempertahankan diri?"
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Berkatalah ia, "Ya Rabbku! Mengapa Engkau menghimpun aku dalam keadaan buta, padahal dahulunya aku adalah orang yang melihat?") yakni di kala ia hidup di dunia melihat tetapi di kala ia dibangkitkan hidup kembali buta.
t_id.iwq: Berkatalah ia: "Ya Tuhanku, mengapa Engkau menghimpunkan aku dalam keadaan buta, padahal aku dahulunya adalah seorang yang melihat?"

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «قال ربِّ لمَ حشرتني أعمى وقد كنت بصيراً» في الدنيا وعند البعث
tafsir.siraj-ar: قَالَ رَبِّ لِمَ حَشَرۡتَنِيٓ أَعۡمَىٰ وَقَدۡ كُنتُ بَصِيرٗا
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Berkatalah ia, "Ya Rabbku! Mengapa Engkau menghimpun aku dalam keadaan buta, padahal dahulunya aku adalah orang yang melihat?") yakni di kala ia hidup di dunia melihat tetapi di kala ia dibangkitkan hidup kembali buta

ar: قَالَ كَذَ ٰلِكَ أَتَتۡكَ ءَایَـٰتُنَا فَنَسِیتَهَاۖ وَكَذَ ٰلِكَ ٱلۡیَوۡمَ تُنسَىٰ
ar_simple: قال كذ لك أتتك ءایتنا فنسیتها وكذ لك ٱلیوم تنسى

t.sahih-int: [Allah] will say, "Thus did Our signs come to you, and you forgot them; and thus will you this Day be forgotten
t.asad: [God] will reply: "Thus it is: there came unto thee Our messages, but thou wert oblivious of them; and thus shalt thou be today consigned to oblivion
t.yusuf-ali: (Allah) will say: "Thus didst Thou, when Our Signs came unto thee, disregard them: so wilt thou, this day, be disregarded
t.pickthall: He will say: So (it must be). Our revelations came unto thee but thou didst forget them. In like manner thou art forgotten this Day
t.arberry: God shall say, 'Even so it is. Our signs came unto thee, and thou didst forget them; and so today thou art forgotten
t.hilali-khan: (Allah) will say: "Like this, Our Ayat (proofs, evidences, verses, lessons, signs, revelations, etc.) came unto you, but you disregarded them (i.e. you left them, did not think deeply in them, and you turned away from them), and so this Day, you will be neglected (in the Hell-fire, away from Allah's Mercy)
t.itani: He will say, “Just as Our revelations came to you, and you forgot them, today you will be forgotten.”
t.mubarakpuri: (Allah) will say: "Like this Our Ayat came unto you, but you disregarded them, and so this Day, you will be neglected."
t.qarib: [God] will say, "Just as Our Signs came to you and you forgot them, in the same way, you too will this Day will be forgotten
t.wahiduddin: God will say, "Just as Our signs came to you and you ignored them, so will you on this Day be ignored
t.shakir: He will say: Even so, Our communications came to you but you neglected them; even thus shall you be forsaken this day
t.haleem: God will say, ‘This is how it is: You ignored Our revelations when they came to you, so today you will be ignored.’
t.maariful: He will say, “In the similar manner as Our signs came to you, and you had ignored them. In the same way you will be ignored today.”
t.khattab: Allah will respond, “It is so, just as Our revelations came to you and you neglected them, so Today you are neglected.”
t.ghali: Said He, "Thus it is. Our signs came up to you, yet you forgot them; and thus today you are forgotten
t.irving: He will say: "Thus did Our signs come to you, and you forgot them; that is why you have been forgotten today."´
t.iwq: Allah will say, "Thus did Our signs come to you, and you forgot them; and thus will you this Day be forgotten

t_id.kemenag: Allah berfirman: "Demikianlah, telah datang kepadamu ayat-ayat Kami, maka kamu melupakannya, dan begitu (pula) pada hari ini kamupun dilupakan".
t_id.sabiq: "Itulah yang terjadi," kata Allah kepadanya. "Dahulu, ketika bukti-bukti dan rasul-rasul Kami datang kepadamu di dunia, kamu melupakannya dan berpura-pura buta: tidak melihat dan tidak mempercayainya. Begitu pula hari ini: kamu ditinggalkan dan dilupakan dalam siksaan dan kehinaan.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Allah berfirman,) perkaranya ("Demikianlah, telah datang kepadamu ayat-ayat Kami, maka kamu melupakannya) kamu meninggalkannya dan tidak mau beriman kepadanya (dan begitu pula) sebagaimana kamu lupa kepada ayat-ayat Kami (pada hari ini kamu pun dilupakan") dibiarkan tinggal di dalam neraka.
t_id.iwq: Allah berfirman: "Demikianlah, telah datang kepadamu ayat-ayat Kami, maka kamu melupakannya, dan begitu (pula) pada hari ini kamupun dilupakan".

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «قال» الأمر «كذلك أتتك آياتنا فنسيتها» تركتها ولم تؤمن بها «وكذلك» مثل نسيانك آياتنا «اليوم تنسى» تترك في النار
tafsir.siraj-ar: قَالَ كَذَٰلِكَ أَتَتۡكَ ءَايَٰتُنَا فَنَسِيتَهَاۖ وَكَذَٰلِكَ ٱلۡيَوۡمَ تُنسَىٰ (فَنَسِيتَهَا: أَعْرَضْتَ عَنْهَا)
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Allah berfirman,) perkaranya ("Demikianlah, telah datang kepadamu ayat-ayat Kami, maka kamu melupakannya) kamu meninggalkannya dan tidak mau beriman kepadanya (dan begitu pula) sebagaimana kamu lupa kepada ayat-ayat Kami (pada hari ini kamu pun dilupakan") dibiarkan tinggal di dalam neraka

ar: وَكَذَ ٰلِكَ نَجۡزِی مَنۡ أَسۡرَفَ وَلَمۡ یُؤۡمِنۢ بِءَایَـٰتِ رَبِّهِۦۚ وَلَعَذَابُ ٱلۡءَاخِرَةِ أَشَدُّ وَأَبۡقَىٰۤ
ar_simple: وكذ لك نجزی من أسرف ولم یؤمن بءایت ربه ولعذاب ٱلءاخرة أشد وأبقى

t.sahih-int: And thus do We recompense he who transgressed and did not believe in the signs of his Lord. And the punishment of the Hereafter is more severe and more enduring
t.asad: For, thus shall We recompense him who wastes his own self and does not believe in his Sustainer's messages: and, indeed, the suffering [of such sinners] in the life to come shall be most severe and most enduring
t.yusuf-ali: And thus do We recompense him who transgresses beyond bounds and believes not in the Signs of his Lord: and the Penalty of the Hereafter is far more grievous and more enduring
t.pickthall: Thus do We reward him who is prodigal and believeth not the revelations of his Lord; and verily the doom of the Hereafter will be sterner and more lasting
t.arberry: So We recompense him who is prodigal and believes not in the signs of his Lord; and the chastisement of the world to come is more terrible and more enduring
t.hilali-khan: And thus do We requite him who transgresses beyond bounds [i.e. commits the great sins and disobeys his Lord (Allah) and believes not in His Messengers, and His revealed Books, like this Quran, etc.], and believes not in the Ayat (proofs, evidences, verses, lessons, signs, revelations, etc.) of his Lord, and the torment of the Hereafter is far more severe and more lasting
t.itani: Thus We recompense him who transgresses and does not believe in the revelations of his Lord. The punishment of the Hereafter is more severe, and more lasting.
t.mubarakpuri: And thus do We requite him who transgresses beyond bounds and believes not in the Ayat of his Lord; and the torment of the Hereafter is far more severe and more lasting.
t.qarib: This is how We repay him who goes too far and does not believe in the signs of his Lord. And the punishment of the Hereafter is more severe and more enduring
t.wahiduddin: Thus We shall reward the transgressor who denies the signs of his Lord. But the suffering of the life to come is more terrible and more lasting
t.shakir: And thus do We recompense him who is extravagant and does not believe in the communications of his Lord, and certainly the chastisement of the hereafter is severer and more
t.haleem: This is how We reward those who go too far, and who do not believe in their Lord’s revelations. The greatest and most enduring punishment is in the Hereafter
t.maariful: Thus We recompense him who exceeds the limits and does not believe in the signs of his Lord. Certainly the punishment of the Hereafter is more severe and more lasting
t.khattab: This is how We reward whoever transgresses and does not believe in the revelations of their Lord. And the punishment of the Hereafter is far more severe and more lasting
t.ghali: And thus We recompense him who exceeds all bounds and does not believe in the signs of his Lord; and indeed the torment of the Hereafter is more strict and more enduring
t.irving: Thus We reward anyone who overdoes things and does not believe in his Lord´s signs. Torment in the Hereafter will be even more severe and everlasting
t.iwq: And thus do We recompense he who transgressed and did not believe in the signs of his Lord. And the punishment of the Hereafter is more severe and more enduring

t_id.kemenag: Dan demikianlah Kami membalas orang yang melampaui batas dan tidak percaya kepada ayat-ayat Tuhannya. Dan sesungguhnya azab di akhirat itu lebih berat dan lebih kekal.
t_id.sabiq: Balasan buruk seperti ini Kami berikan di dunia untuk orang yang berbuat maksiat dan mendustakan Allah dan ayat-ayat-Nya. Sesungguhnya siksaan di akhirat benar-benar lebih pedih dan lebih abadi daripada siksaan di dunia."
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Dan demikianlah) sebagaimana Kami membalas kepada orang yang berpaling daripada Alquran (Kami membalas orang yang melampaui batas) orang yang musyrik (dan tidak percaya kepada ayat-ayat Rabbnya. Dan sesungguhnya azab di akhirat itu lebih berat) daripada azab di dunia dan azab kubur (dan lebih kekal) lebih abadi.
t_id.iwq: Dan demikianlah Kami membalas orang yang melampaui batas dan tidak percaya kepada ayat-ayat Tuhannya. Dan sesungguhnya azab di akhirat itu lebih berat dan lebih kekal.

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «وكذلك» ومثل جزائنا من أعرض عن القرآن «نجزي من أسرف» أشرك «ولم يؤمن بآيات ربه ولعذاب الآخرة أشد» من عذاب الدنيا وعذاب القبر «وأبقى» أدوم
tafsir.siraj-ar: وَكَذَٰلِكَ نَجۡزِي مَنۡ أَسۡرَفَ وَلَمۡ يُؤۡمِنۢ بِـَٔايَٰتِ رَبِّهِۦۚ وَلَعَذَابُ ٱلۡأٓخِرَةِ أَشَدُّ وَأَبۡقَىٰٓ
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Dan demikianlah) sebagaimana Kami membalas kepada orang yang berpaling daripada Alquran (Kami membalas orang yang melampaui batas) orang yang musyrik (dan tidak percaya kepada ayat-ayat Rabbnya. Dan sesungguhnya azab di akhirat itu lebih berat) daripada azab di dunia dan azab kubur (dan lebih kekal) lebih abadi

ar: أَفَلَمۡ یَهۡدِ لَهُمۡ كَمۡ أَهۡلَكۡنَا قَبۡلَهُم مِّنَ ٱلۡقُرُونِ یَمۡشُونَ فِی مَسَـٰكِنِهِمۡۚ إِنَّ فِی ذَ ٰلِكَ لَءَایَـٰتࣲ لِّأُو۟لِی ٱلنُّهَىٰ
